commands.review_summary:
The PR adds list/help support and six lane aliases to `scripts/qa/docker-e2e-lane.ts` while deleting the unused QA transport scenario helper and its re-export.

PR surface: Source -170, Tests -139, Other +38. Total -271 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug report. The reviewable behavior is source-checkable on the PR head: `--list`/`--help` are implemented in the fixed lane map, and the removed helper has no surviving current-main callers outside the removed paths.
commands.review_followup: - No ClawSweeper repair is needed; the remaining action is normal exact-head CI and maintainer review.

target.title: test(qa): expand docker lane adapter
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Keeps step 1 of the real-E2E QA cleanup focused on reusable Docker lane dispatch without leaving unused QA helper modules behind.

The prior transport-scenario helper from #97915 was only test-consumed, and the script-producer helper added in this PR was not wired to a production QA consumer. The deadcode gate was right to reject that shape.

## Why This Change Was Made

- Expands `scripts/qa/docker-e2e-lane.ts` with existing Docker E2E lane names needed by upcoming QA scenario wrappers.
- Adds `--list` and `--help` to the Docker lane adapter so scenario wrappers can discover/validate lane names without duplicating the map.
- Removes the unused `qa-transport-scenarios` helper and its unit test instead of preserving an unused re-export/helper surface.
- Removes the broad QA transport helper re-export from `live-transport-scenarios.ts`; live transport code continues to use the existing SDK seam directly.

## User Impact

No taxonomy IDs, product runtime behavior, or QA scenario coverage claims change. This is QA infrastructure cleanup that keeps future script-to-QA migrations grounded in existing executable lanes without adding unused helper APIs.

## Evidence

- `pnpm deadcode:unused-files`
- `pnpm deadcode:dependencies`
- `pnpm deadcode:report:ci:ts-unused`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/qa-lab/src/live-transports/shared/live-transport-scenarios.test.ts --reporter=verbose`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/extension-test-boundary.test.ts --reporter=verbose`
- `pnpm check:test-types`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check extensions/qa-lab/src/live-transports/shared/live-transport-scenarios.ts scripts/qa/docker-e2e-lane.ts`
- `node --import tsx scripts/qa/docker-e2e-lane.ts --list`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` clean
target.author: romneyda
